programme.title: A Carrinha Do Bento
programme.desc: Um dos veículos mais míticos da história do Benfica, a Carrinha do Bento, o transporte do “grupo do Barreiro”, vai percorrer o país à procura das melhores histórias, dos protagonistas e da recuperação de momentos incríveis do SL Benfica. Com Carlos Manuel ao volante e com a presença de glórias do Benfica, a viagem na Carrinha do Bento culmina com a presença perante o auditório benfiquista.

programme.title: Benfica 24 Horas
programme.desc: Bloco informativo dedicado ao Benfica e aos desafios em que se encontra envolvido.

programme.title: Protagonista
programme.desc: O sucesso desportivo mede-se pelos títulos e pelas conquistas, mas há sempre algo que os protagonistas deixam por dizer, na hora da vitória. A marca que deixam, como se preparam para o sucesso, os segredos mais bem guardados de quem nasceu para ganhar. Histórias de sucesso, forradas de benfiquismo em meia hora de conversa.

programme.title: Benfica No Feminino
programme.desc: Em poucos anos, o número de modalidades femininas no Sport Lisboa e Benfica cresceu ao ponto de corresponder ao número das masculinas. O termo “sexo fraco” é obsoleto, sinal do passado, e na competição do clube menos sentido faz nos dias que correm. Benfica no Feminino é o programa que vira os holofotes para as mulheres do SLB, atletas e treinadoras.

programme.title: Mais Vantagens
programme.desc: Um programa dedicado ao cartão de sócio do SLB e aos benefícios que o mesmo dá aos associados, com testemunhos das empresas e dos próprios sócios do Benfica.

programme.title: Pelas Casas Do Benfica
programme.desc: Informação sobre as casas do Benfica e delegações do clube espalhadas pelo País. Curiosidades, imagens de posters e recordações das décadas anteriores, testemunhos de sócios e simpatizantes que seguem o Sport Lisboa e Benfica onde estiver e onde jogar.

programme.title: Vermelho Claro
programme.desc: Não é encarnado nem é cor-de-rosa, é Vermelho Claro. E Vermelho Claro é o programa da BTV dedicado às marcas, aos eventos mais mediáticos do momento e às celebridades. Todas as semanas, um convidado conhecido do grande público é entrevistado, tendo como palco o Estádio da Luz. Um programa de Carlos Dias da Silva.

programme.title: Carlos Manuel

programme.title: MEGA Fights T1 - Ep. 50
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior T7 - Ep. 9
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Houston Qualifier tackle the Houston Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Walking Bar, Crazy Cliffhanger and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! T1 - Ep. 37
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Jhonny Gonzalez defending the WBO bantamweight title against Gerry Penalosa. A left hook to the body ends the fight. Also on the card, a controversial ending to the Nate Campbell / Ali Funeka brawl.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo T26 - Ep. 2
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, Show 2 features Kagayaki, Asanoyama, Daieisho and Aoiyama.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights T3 - Ep. 39
programme.desc: This episode features a Light Welterweight title bout between the unbeaten Danny Garcia and #1 contender Amir Khan, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston T1 - Ep. 4
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 4 of 4.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA T2025 - Ep. 5
programme.desc: In this episode Igeu 'Smiley' Kabesa meets Humphrey 'King Cobra' Mulenga for the World Lightweight Championship.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 T1 - Ep. 11
programme.desc: This episode features heavyweights Tomasz Adamek (217 lbs 40- 1- 0) vs. Chris Arreola (250? lbs. 28- 1- 0) from the Citizens Business Bank Arena, Ontario, California, USA on April 24, 2010.

programme.title: Greatest Classics T1 - Ep. 49
programme.desc: In this episode, the newly crowned IBF Lightweight World Champion, Shane Mosley, makes the first defense of the title he claimed from Phillip Holiday just three months earlier. He would face a tough competitor in Manuel Gomez of Laredo, Mexico, who would give the new champion a difficult test.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! T1 - Ep. 20
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Juan Diaz with three lightweight titles on the line. This fight earned Fight of the Year honors from The Ring magazine. Also on the card, heavyweight kickboxing action.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo T26 - Ep. 3
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena, in Tokyo, Japan, Show 3 features Shodai, Kiribayama, Endo and Ryuden.

programme.title: Fight Quest T1 - Ep. 13
programme.desc: Episode 13: Hong Kong - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Wing Chun and Martial Art of Rapid Fire Punches and Kicks with Grandmaster Leung Ting and Sifu Kong Chi Keung.

programme.title: FS MMA T2 - Ep. 8
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features part 1 of all the highlights from BodogFIGHT season two showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in St. Petersburg, Russia.

programme.title: MEGA Fights T1 - Ep. 54
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-0, 17 KOs) making the 5th defense of his WBC and WBO Middleweight Titles, this time against upstart Kelly 'The Ghost' Pavlik (31-0, 28 KOs) on September 29, 2007 at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA.

programme.title: Saturday Encore Presentation T2026 - Ep. 502
programme.desc: From the T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, two of the top fighters in their division meet when undefeated WBC Light Heavyweight World Champion David Benavidez moves up in weight and puts his 31-0 record on the line to take on WBO Cruiserweight World Champion, 48-1 Gilberto 'Zurdo' Ramirez. In the Co-Feature, another world class matchup takes place when Jose Armando Resendiz meets hard-hitting former champion Jamie Munguia.

programme.title: Introducing: T1 - Ep. 1
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS Presents 'Introducing:', a new original documentary series that covers the current stars of today and rising stars of tomorrow. Each episode we get an up close and personal perspective of their lives and see what drives them to be the best at what they do. Introducing: Caitlin Dechelle, provides an intimate look at one of the most dominant women in the history of martial arts tournaments.

programme.title: MMA:30 T1 - Ep. 6
programme.desc: This episode brings you behind the scenes at the UFC Fan Expo with current UFC roster members Wanderlei Silva, Frank Mir and Donald 'Cowboy' Cerrone. Two of the top corner men in the sport breakdown an MMA fight before our eyes. MMA:30 interviews the most popular ring girl in the game today, Arianny Celeste as she talks about her own MMA training exclusively on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA T1 - Ep. 126
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of mixed martial arts headlined by a welterweight title fight between Dricus du Plessis and Martin Van Staden. Bonus coverage includes a lightweight battle between Mthobisi Buthelezi and Luke Michael and a bantamweight clash between Bill Thusi and Tjaart Henning.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights T3 - Ep. 38
programme.desc: This episode features undefeated 20-year-old Dominican prospect Javier 'El Abejon' Fortuna vs Derrick Wilson for the vacant WBC Youth World featherweight title, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League T2023 - Ep. 16
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! T1 - Ep. 18
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Lamont Peterson facing Amir Khan in a light welterweight title bout that ends in a controversial decision due to a point deduction. Also on the card, heavyweight kickboxing action.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo T26 - Ep. 4

From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena, in Tokyo, Japan, Show 4 features Kotoeko, Mitakeumi, Hakuho and Takanosho.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA T1 - Ep. 126
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of mixed martial arts headlined by a welterweight title fight between Dricus du Plessis and Martin Van Staden. Bonus coverage includes a lightweight battle between Mthobisi Buthelezi and Luke Michael and a bantamweight clash between Bill Thusi and Tjaart Henning.

programme.title: MEGA Fights T1 - Ep. 54
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-0, 17 KOs) making the 5th defense of his WBC and WBO Middleweight Titles, this time against upstart Kelly 'The Ghost' Pavlik (31-0, 28 KOs) on September 29, 2007 at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights T3 - Ep. 38
programme.desc: This episode features undefeated 20-year-old Dominican prospect Javier 'El Abejon' Fortuna vs Derrick Wilson for the vacant WBC Youth World featherweight title, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League T2023 - Ep. 16
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! T1 - Ep. 18
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Lamont Peterson facing Amir Khan in a light welterweight title bout that ends in a controversial decision due to a point deduction. Also on the card, heavyweight kickboxing action.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo T26 - Ep. 4
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena, in Tokyo, Japan, Show 4 features Kotoeko, Mitakeumi, Hakuho and Takanosho.

programme.title: Introducing: T1 - Ep. 1
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS Presents 'Introducing:', a new original documentary series that covers the current stars of today and rising stars of tomorrow. Each episode we get an up close and personal perspective of their lives and see what drives them to be the best at what they do. Introducing: Caitlin Dechelle, provides an intimate look at one of the most dominant women in the history of martial arts tournaments.

programme.title: Return to the Ring T1 - Ep. 1
programme.desc: Delivering the untold stories behind some of the most exciting fights in the sport, FIGHT SPORTS brings you 'Return to the Ring'. In this original documentary series, we sit with the participants from some of boxing's most interesting bouts, including the fighters, trainers, officials and promoters that contributed to each event.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! T1 - Ep. 34
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the first encounter between Sergio Martinez and Paul Williams. The bout is closely contested throughout and was pegged as a Fight of the Year candidate for 2009.
